title: Maybe Shinji should read this page
display_title: Maybe Shinji should read this page
wikitext:
[]: Maybe Shinji should read this page             Quote Post by BeoX2 » Sat Sep 11, 2010 8:53 pm http://www.quotelady.com/subjects/solitude.html Hmmm, lonliness? Shinji, read this now!

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sun Sep 12, 2010 3:12 am For some reason, I have some ronery tears in my eyes right now.

[]: [silence]             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Sun Sep 12, 2010 9:42 am

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Sun Sep 12, 2010 9:16 pm Good God, this is painful... I will not stand this! Goodbye Cruel World! (lol, just kidding. Interesting link.)

[]:             Quote Post by Bobbk » Mon Sep 13, 2010 10:50 pm That actually made me feel happier, reading that. Shinji though....hmm.

[]:             Quote Post by Sun Stealer » Wed Sep 15, 2010 10:28 pm Meta!Shinji, don't read this. Make friends instead, or better yet, realize you already have friends.

[]: Re: Maybe Shinji should read this page             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Fri Sep 17, 2010 3:43 pm BeoX2 wrote: http://www.quotelady.com/subjects/solitude.html Hmmm, lonliness? Shinji, read this now!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Sep 17, 2010 4:29 pm Huge difference between solitude and loneliness. Interesting link at any rate, I've seen some of those quotes before.

[]:             Quote Post by BeoX2 » Sun Sep 19, 2010 8:58 pm You know what Shinji should watch? This show called "Neon Genesis Evangelion." It's all about loneliness and stuff.......wait..... [Directed my M. Night Shyamalan]

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Sun Sep 19, 2010 9:09 pm What a twist!

[]:             Quote Post by BeoX2 » Sun Sep 19, 2010 9:14 pm child of Lilith wrote: What a twist!

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Sun Sep 19, 2010 11:02 pm child of Lilith wrote: What a tweest!

[]:             Quote Post by BeoX2 » Sun Sep 26, 2010 9:43 pm While we're at it, Shinji's theme song should probably be "One" by Three Dog Night. After all, "one is the loneliest number." In fact, "2 can be as bad as one. It's the loneliest number since the number one."

[]:             Quote Post by soda7777777 » Sun Sep 26, 2010 10:06 pm No, it should be "Isolation" by Joy Division. "Mother I tried please believe me, I'm doing the best that I can. I'm ashamed of the things I've been put through, I'm ashamed of the person I am." If that doesn't scream Shinji, well I don't know what does.

[]:             Quote Post by LeoXiao » Tue Sep 28, 2010 9:59 am Maybe it's because I don't mind being alone at all (I'm not even scared of nonexistence), but I actually agree a great deal with this article.

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Tue Sep 28, 2010 12:35 pm soda7777777 wrote: Joy Division.

[]:             Quote Post by AngelNo13Bardiel » Tue Sep 28, 2010 3:48 pm soda7777777 wrote: If that doesn't scream Shinji, well I don't know what does.

[]:             Quote Post by soda7777777 » Tue Sep 28, 2010 5:30 pm AngelNo13Bardiel wrote: ...great, now I'm tempted to take a few days and search through their discography's lyrics. Hey, never can tell where you'll find those "synching lyrics" (a habit of mine I divulge in regularly, I confess).

[]:             Quote Post by AngelNo13Bardiel » Tue Sep 28, 2010 5:32 pm Eh...nevermind me, just rambling. Carry on.
summary:
[]: Maybe Shinji should read this page             Quote Post by BeoX2 » Sat Sep 11, 2010 8:53 pm http://www.quotelady.com/subjects/solitude.html Hmmm, lonliness? Shinji, read this now!

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sun Sep 12, 2010 3:12 am For some reason, I have some ronery tears in my eyes right now.

[]: [silence]         &nb
